stage.loadingVad: Loading Silero VAD speech detection model (first run downloads ~10 MB)…

queue.queuedPreparing: Queued job is preparing to start
queue.runningInterrupted: Running job was interrupted by app restart
queue.pausedRestored: Paused job restored to queue after app restart
queue.skippingWait: Skip requested. Waiting for the current process to exit before moving on.
queue.stoppingWait: Stop requested. Waiting for the current process to exit.
queue.skippedDone: Current file skipped. Moving on to the next one.

log.noMissingFiles: No media files without subtitles were found.
log.noQueuedFiles: No queued media files are ready for transcription.
log.pathRefreshed: PATH refreshed from registry after install.
